acceptance_criteria.text: Authenticated browser smoke verifies Agent Blueprint UI markers on production and cleans temporary fixture rows.
proof: Temporary smoke fixture was created with a completed Agent Blueprint run.
Browser login to localos.pro succeeded for the smoke user.
Dashboard agents page showed sourcing inputs, run timeline, artifacts, approvals, approval queue, queued_not_dispatched, prospectingleads source, source_artifact lineage, and full payload markers.
Cleanup removed smoke user, business, lead, blueprint, and run; follow-up DB counts were all zero.
gaps: No screenshot artifact was captured; text-marker verification was used.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Create smoke fixture with SMOKE_KEEP_FIXTURE=1 using scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py inside app container
Log into https://localos.pro/login as the smoke user
Open https://localos.pro/dashboard/agents, select the smoke run, and verify UI markers
Run cleanup_fixture and verify zero remaining smoke rows
